heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyPrivacy PolicyThe protection of your personal data is very important to us, and we understand our responsibilities to handle your personal data with care, to keep it secure and to comply with legal requirements.This Privacy Policy was updated on Mar. 6th, 2020.

decoder_heading: 1. WHAT personal data do we collect?
ident_heading: 1. WHAT personal data do we collect?

decoder_heading: WHAT personal data do we collect?
ident_heading: WHAT personal data do we collect?
heading_content_part: WHAT personal data do we collect?We collect information about the product and services that you use and how you use them in order to properly provide the core or important features of our product and service, or to improve our product and service, or to provide additional features to our product (such as socializing functions or value-added services and promotions, etc.).

decoder_heading: 2. What do we use your information for?
ident_heading: 2. What do we use your information for?
heading_content_part: 2. What do we use your information for?Any of the information we collect from you may be used in one of the following ways:
To improve our website(we continually strive to improve our website offerings based on the information and feedback we receive from you)
To improve customer service(your information helps us to more effectively respond to your customer service requests and support needs)

To process transactionsYour information, whether public or private, will not be sold, exchanged, transferred, or given to any other company for any reason whatsoever, without your consent, other than for the express purpose of delivering the purchased product or service requested.
To send periodic emailsThe email address you provide for order processing, will only be used to send you information and updates pertaining to your order.

decoder_heading: 3. How do we protect your information?
ident_heading: 3. How do we protect your information?
heading_content_part: 3. How do we protect your information?

decoder_heading: We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information when you place an order
ident_heading: We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information when you place an order
heading_content_part: We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information when you place an order

decoder_heading: We offer the use of a secure server
ident_heading: We offer the use of a secure server
heading_content_part: We offer the use of a secure server. All supplied sensitive/credit information is transmitted via Secure Socket Layer (SSL) technology and then encrypted into our Payment gateway providers database only to be accessible by those authorized with special access rights to such systems, and are required to keep the information confidential.

decoder_heading: After a transaction, your private information (credit cards, financials, etc.) will not be stored on our servers
ident_heading: After a transaction, your private information (credit cards, financials, etc.) will not be stored on our servers
heading_content_part: After a transaction, your private information (credit cards, financials, etc.) will not be stored on our servers.

decoder_heading: 4. How long do we keep your personal data?
ident_heading: 4. How long do we keep your personal data?
heading_content_part: 4. How long do we keep your personal data?

decoder_heading: We will retain your personal data for as long as is reasonably necessary
ident_heading: We will retain your personal data for as long as is reasonably necessary
heading_content_part: We will retain your personal data for as long as is reasonably necessary. In some circumstances we may retain your personal data for longer periods of time, for example where we are required to do so to meet legal, regulatory, tax or accounting requirements.

decoder_heading: In specific circumstances we may also retain your personal data for longer periods of time
ident_heading: In specific circumstances we may also retain your personal data for longer periods of time
heading_content_part: In specific circumstances we may also retain your personal data for longer periods of time so that we have an accurate record of your dealings with us in the event of any complaints or challenges, or if we reasonably believe there is a possibility of legal action relating to your personal data or dealings. Where your personal data is no longer required we will ensure it is either securely deleted or stored in a way which means it will no longer be used by the business.
5. Your consentBy using our apps, you consent to our apps privacy policy.
6. Changes to our Privacy PolicyIf we decide to change our privacy policy, we will post those changes on this page.
7. Contacting usIf there are any questions regarding this privacy policy you may contact us using the information below.Email address:vpnstudio2020@gmail.comAddress:Jaffe Road Causeway Bay Hong Kong
